entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis Hypogaea being studied for yield differences under drought stress.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress characterized by limited water availability.

entities.name: LEAF DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The rate and process of leaf production in groundnut genotypes.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor that primarily influences the rate of leaf development.

entities.name: THERMAL TIME
entities.description: The cumulative temperature required to produce one leaf.

entities.name: LEAF WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: A measure of the water status of the leaf, showing a linear relation with thermal time below -0.6 MPa.

entities.name: FLOWER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing flowers, analyzed in relation to leaf number.

entities.name: PEG PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing pegs, analyzed in relation to leaf number.

entities.name: POD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing pods, analyzed in relation to leaf number.

entities.name: LEAF NUMBER
entities.description: The total number of leaves, which integrates the effects of temperature and water status.

entities.name: WATER STATUS
entities.description: The state of water availability and stress within the plant.

entities.name: TMV 2
entities.description: A groundnut genotype that maintained a high pod to peg ratio and partitioning factor during drought.

entities.name: KADIRI 3
entities.description: A groundnut genotype that maintained peg production during drought and achieved high harvest index and pod yield.

entities.name: PARTITIONING FACTOR
entities.description: The factor determining the allocation of resources to pods during the pod-filling period.

entities.name: POD-FILLING PERIOD
entities.description: The developmental stage during which pods are filled with nutrients.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of pod yield to total biomass.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of pods produced by the plant.
